prompt: Design a weekly group Bible study rhythm inside Reveal’s community.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Session structure UI
nodes.details: Weekly rhythm surface shows gather → read → share → close with clear hierarchy and calm pacing.

nodes.label: Reading plan affordance
nodes.details: Reading plan is glanceable on mobile; progress states never shame missed weeks.

nodes.label: Quiet participation mode
nodes.details: Lurker-friendly participation: listen/read without forced posting.

nodes.label: Accessible session flow
nodes.details: Type size, focus order, and screen-reader labels support longer reflective reading.

nodes.label: Invitation not dump UI
nodes.details: UI must invite into formation rather than dump content modules.
nodes.strategicAnswer: form people, not dump content. Invitation tone.
